findings.summary: MIPI DSI data lane differential pairs not detected
findings.details: The schematic has 4 MIPI DSI data lanes with named net pairs DATAP0/DATAN0, DATAP1/DATAN1, DATAP2/DATAN2, DATAP3/DATAN3, but the differential pair detector only identified CLK_P/CLK_N. All four data lane pairs share the same naming convention (_P/_N suffix) used to detect the clock pair and should have been detected.

findings.summary: LTC3638 regulator output voltage and output rail wrong due to floating-GND topology
findings.details: The LTC3638 (U3) is used in a floating-GND negative-supply configuration: its GND pin (pin 8) is tied to the -6V net rather than system GND, and VIN=+5V. The analyzer computes estimated_vout=0.692V using the standard Vout=Vref*(1+Rtop/Rbottom) formula against system GND, but the actual regulated output is -6V referenced to system GND.

findings.summary: LTC3638 switching regulator topology and feedback network correctly identified
findings.details: The analyzer correctly identifies U3 as a switching regulator (topology=switching), associates inductor L1, input rail +5V, and resolves the feedback divider (R2 20k top, R1 130k bottom). The structural identification is correct even though the Vout estimate is wrong.
